editions.name: Energy Drink
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Energy Drink is loved by many people around the world, including athletes, office workers, college students, and travelers

editions.name: Energy Drink Sugarfree
editions.flavor_description: It is a Red Bull Energy Drink without sugar

editions.name: The Green Edition
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Green Edition combines refreshing tropical fruit notes with a sweet floral scent

editions.name: The Pink Edition
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Pink Edition features the crispness of citrus and a floral scent added to the aroma of Peach

editions.name: The Purple Edition
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Purple Edition features an added grape flavor for a refreshing experience
